_doc: Single source of truth for SuperSpecs harness support. Consumed by `superspecs init --harness=<name>`, README install section, and tests/harness/payload-parity.test.ts. Adding a new harness = one entry here + the canonical manifest file + (if applicable) one branch in hooks/session-start{,.ps1}. See docs/architecture.md ADR-011.

harnesses.name: codex
harnesses._note: Codex reads AGENTS.md at root automatically; no plugin manifest. Skills live at .agents/skills per Codex convention but SuperSpecs ships them at skills/ and references them from AGENTS.md.

harnesses.name: opencode
harnesses._note: OpenCode reads AGENTS.md at root automatically; no plugin manifest. AGENTS.md content is shared with Codex.

harnesses.name: gemini
harnesses._note: Gemini loads the file named by contextFileName in gemini-extension.json. We point it at AGENTS.md so Gemini, Codex, and OpenCode share one context file.
